name: Sweetheart Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Cooked or canned beets, chopped
6 Red pepper rings, cut into halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise and sour cream in a bowl; mix well.
2. Toss the chopped apples with lemon juice.
3. Add the mayonnaise mixture to the apples and beets; mix lightly.
4. Chill the salad mixture.
5. For each serving, place about half a cup of salad on an iceberg lettuce slice.
6. Surround the salad with two halves of red pepper, shaping it into a heart.
Source: Chef Keith Keogh, Executive Chef, Epcot Center, Walt Disney World
